notes: batch-size one repack noops like stock Git and leaves pack files plus multi-pack-index verification unchanged

stock_git_case: git multi-pack-index repack --batch-size=0 && git multi-pack-index expire
notes: batch-size zero repack consolidates packs and expire removes redundant packs like stock Git while fsck and MIDX verify stay clean
stock Git rejects bad MIDX signatures with fatal signature mismatch diagnostics and exit 128
stock Git rejects unrecognized MIDX versions with fatal version diagnostics and exit 128
stock Git rejects unsupported MIDX hash versions with parse diagnostics and exit 1
stock Git accepts a nonzero reserved header byte in an otherwise valid MIDX file
